result: The data cleaning and preprocessing task has been completed. The R script successfully loaded the required datasets, merged them using the NSID variable, and derived the time-varying geographical location variables (`regub15`, `regub16`, `regov15`, `regov16`, `regor25`, `regor32`, and `regint32`) according to the specified harmonisation and missing-value rules. The final output was written to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
